title: Linear Mirage
description: Ce style fusionne la photographie analogique nostalgique et tamisée avec un dessin au trait numérique net et contemporain. Une base photographique monochrome ou sépia, douce et granuleuse, est superposée de lignes vectorielles lisses, continues et décalées qui tracent et abstraient librement les formes sous-jacentes. Le contraste entre la réalité photographique tactile et diffuse et les contours géométriques plats et saisissants crée une esthétique éditoriale poétique et multimédia.
description_en: This style fuses nostalgic, muted analog photography with crisp, contemporary digital line art. A soft, grainy monochromatic or sepia-toned photographic base is overlaid with smooth, continuous, offset vector lines that loosely trace and abstract the underlying forms. The contrast between the tactile, diffused photographic reality and the stark, flat geometric contours creates a poetic, mixed-media editorial aesthetic.
description_fr: Ce style fusionne la photographie analogique nostalgique et tamisée avec un dessin au trait numérique net et contemporain. Une base photographique monochrome ou sépia, douce et granuleuse, est superposée de lignes vectorielles lisses, continues et décalées qui tracent et abstraient librement les formes sous-jacentes. Le contraste entre la réalité photographique tactile et diffuse et les contours géométriques plats et saisissants crée une esthétique éditoriale poétique et multimédia.
prompt: Create a mixed-media editorial composition combining vintage analog photography with crisp digital line art overlays. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The base layer is a soft-focus, grainy photographic rendering in a muted, low-contrast monochromatic palette dominated by {{primary_color}} with subtle {{secondary_color}} midtones. Lighting is soft, diffused, and overcast, creating smooth gradients and gentle, low-contrast shadows that give the underlying photographic elements a nostalgic, melancholic atmosphere. Superimposed directly over this tactile, film-like photographic base is a layer of stark, opaque, uniform monoline vector illustrations in {{accent_color}}. These continuous, fluid, abstract lines do not perfectly trace the objects; instead, they act as an offset, stylized contour that loosely outlines and intersects the forms, flattening the spatial dynamics and breaking the 3D illusion. The lines have a constant weight, zero pressure sensitivity, and razor-sharp geometric edges, contrasting heavily with the organic, textured, film-grain materiality of the photographic background. The photographic base exhibits noticeable 35mm film grain, subtle halation, and a matte finish, resembling an archival silver gelatin print or faded sepia photograph. The interplay between the diffuse, textured analog reality and the flat, crisp, minimalist digital linework creates a poetic, avant-garde aesthetic. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners., mixed-media, analog photography, vector overlay, continuous line art, offset contour, monochromatic, film grain, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: Create a mixed-media editorial composition combining vintage analog photography with crisp digital line art overlays, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The base layer is a soft-focus, grainy photographic rendering in a muted, low-contrast monochromatic palette dominated by {{primary_color}} with subtle {{secondary_color}} midtones. Lighting is soft, diffused, and overcast, creating smooth gradients and gentle, low-contrast shadows that give the underlying photographic elements a nostalgic, melancholic atmosphere. Superimposed directly over this tactile, film-like photographic base is a layer of stark, opaque, uniform monoline vector illustrations in {{accent_color}}. These continuous, fluid, abstract lines do not perfectly trace the objects; instead, they act as an offset, stylized contour that loosely outlines and intersects the forms, flattening the spatial dynamics and breaking the 3D illusion. The lines have a constant weight, zero pressure sensitivity, and razor-sharp geometric edges, contrasting heavily with the organic, textured, film-grain materiality of the photographic subject. The subject's edges and the overlapping vector lines interact organically with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} and its abstract line-art aura can extend beyond the visible frame, cropped naturally by the image boundaries. The photographic base exhibits noticeable 35mm film grain, subtle halation, and a matte finish, resembling an archival silver gelatin print or faded sepia photograph. The interplay between the diffuse, textured analog reality and the flat, crisp, minimalist digital linework creates a poetic, avant-garde aesthetic., mixed-media, analog photography, vector overlay, continuous line art, offset contour, monochromatic, film grain
background_prompt: A textured, abstract photographic background resembling a softly draped canvas or studio muslin backdrop. The scene is rendered in a muted, low-contrast monochromatic palette using {{primary_color}} and subtle {{secondary_color}} midtones. Soft, diffused overcast lighting creates gentle, sweeping gradients and minimal shadows across the textured surface. The image features heavy 35mm film grain, a matte finish, and a nostalgic, melancholic atmosphere typical of vintage archival photography, with no sharp foreground elements or distinct subjects to disrupt the soft, ethereal spatial depth.
background_prompt_removebg: A textured, abstract photographic background resembling a softly draped canvas or studio muslin backdrop, rendered in a muted, low-contrast monochromatic palette using {{primary_color}} and subtle {{secondary_color}} midtones. Soft, diffused overcast lighting creates gentle gradients across the textured surface, featuring heavy 35mm film grain and a matte finish. Overlaying this soft photographic scene is a crisp, continuous, abstract monoline vector frame in {{accent_color}}, featuring fluid, overlapping, offset contours that create an avant-garde vignette. This mixed-media scene and its stark geometric line-art overlay transition smoothly into a clean, flat {{background_color}} surface at the outer boundaries, blending the nostalgic analog textures with the modern, solid backdrop.
